title: senegalia pedicellata
intro: Senegalia pedicellata, also known as Acacia pedicellata, is a type of thorny tree or shrub native to South Africa. It belongs to the Mimosoideae subfamily of the Fabaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains flavonoids and tannins that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, providing relief from various health issues. In traditional medicine, the bark is often prepared as a tea or infusion to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and digestive problems, while also serving as a natural remedy for skin and wound healing.
